Terms of Service

Effective Date: 2025-12-28

Last Updated: 2025-12-28

1. Acceptance of Terms

By using the Workout Timer app, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the App.

2. Health and Safety Disclaimer

IMPORTANT: This app is for timing purposes only and is not medical or fitness advice. Consult a healthcare provider before starting any exercise program. Exercise involves risks of injury. You are solely responsible for your safety and will not hold us liable for any injuries, damages, or health complications resulting from your use of this app or participation in exercise activities.

3. In-App Purchases

Premium features are available through in-app purchases. All purchases are processed through your device's app store (Apple App Store or Google Play Store). Refunds are subject to the app store's policies. We may change pricing at any time with notice to existing subscribers.

4. Limitation of Liability

THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES. TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE ARE NOT LIABLE FOR ANY DAMAGES, INCLUDING PERSONAL INJURY, DEATH, HEALTH COMPLICATIONS, DATA LOSS, OR DEVICE DAMAGE ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THE APP. OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US IN THE 12 MONTHS PRIOR TO THE CLAIM.

5. Use of App

You must be at least 9 years old to use this app. Use the app only for lawful purposes. Do not reverse engineer, modify, or create derivative works of the app. The app is our intellectual property and is licensed to you for personal, non-commercial use only.

6. Changes and Termination

We may modify these Terms at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. We may terminate your access at any time. You may stop using the app by uninstalling it.

7. Contact Information

If you have any questions, please contact us at:
